content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.4

## Summary

Reviewed the branch diff against master, including src/contexts/workflow_composition/engine.rs, src/contexts/project_run_record/journal.rs, src/contexts/project_run_record/model.rs, and the updated quick_dev tests. I did not find any correctness, safety, or robustness issues. Targeted test-stub coverage for quick_dev skip/no-skip behavior, resume-after-skip, existing remediation behavior, and the CLI quick_dev end-to-end path all passed.

## Amendments

None.
